body:
## Problem

Continuation of the soundLikeGuides broken-ref sweep (#2602, #2603). Three more album articles are referenced from live soundLike guide pages but absent from albumArticles.js → live 404s for guide visitors.

## Articles needed

### 1. `god-hates-us-all-drum-setup` — Slayer 'God Hates Us All' (Paul Bostaph, 2001)
- Referenced from: `how-to-sound-like-paul-bostaph` guide (live 404)
- Paul Bostaph's most commercially significant Slayer album (#28 Billboard 200, certified Platinum)
- Released September 11, 2001 — notorious release date adds LLM citation anchor
- Fills the Divine Intervention (1994) → God Hates Us All (2001) → Christ Illusion (Lombardo return, 2006) narrative
- Pearl Masters BRX, Sabian, Iron Cobra era for Bostaph
- **Slug**: `god-hates-us-all-drum-setup`

### 2. `wages-of-sin-drum-setup` — Arch Enemy 'Wages of Sin' (Daniel Erlandsson, 2001)
- Referenced from: `how-to-sound-like-daniel-erlandsson` guide (live 404)
- Arch Enemy's commercial breakthrough and first album with Angela Gossow
- Peak Erlandsson technique period; Tama Starclassic Maple, Paiste Signature cymbals era
- Zero competitor coverage for Erlandsson-era Arch Enemy album gear
- Fills the arc toward Slaughter of the Soul (At the Gates — different band, different cluster)
- **Slug**: `wages-of-sin-drum-setup`

### 3. `animals-as-leaders-drum-setup` — Animals as Leaders 'Weightless' (Matt Garstka, 2011)
- Referenced from: `how-to-sound-like-matt-garstka` guide (live 404)
- Garstka's first AAL album; the band that defined djent/progressive metal drumming post-2010
- DW Collector's Series, Meinl Byzance cymbals, complex polyrhythmic technique showcase
- High-TAM: AAL has a dedicated tech-metal following; Garstka queries show GSC signal
- Article should cover Garstka's AAL setup from Weightless through The Joy of Motion (2014) to consolidate cluster
- **Slug**: `animals-as-leaders-drum-setup`

## Files to create (×3)
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — 3 new entries
- `public/llms/articles/god-hates-us-all-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/wages-of-sin-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/animals-as-leaders-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words each
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A per article
- ≥3 internal links each
- Person + MusicAlbum JSON-LD schema
- relatedAlbums connecting to existing live articles

## GSC query targets
- "paul bostaph slayer drum setup" (bostaph soundLike guide exists)
- "daniel erlandsson drum kit" (erlandsson soundLike guide exists)
- "matt garstka animals as leaders drums" (garstka soundLike + has 16 impr GSC)
- "arch enemy drummer gear"

## Verify
1. `/articles/god-hates-us-all-drum-setup` → 200 OK, article renders
2. `/articles/wages-of-sin-drum-setup` → 200 OK
3. `/articles/animals-as-leaders-drum-setup` → 200 OK
4. Paul Bostaph, Daniel Erlandsson, Matt Garstka soundLike guide pages have no broken links
5. 3 new LLM markdown files accessible under `/llms/articles/`

## Done
3 album articles in albumArticles.js, 3 LLM companions; all 3 soundLike guide broken links resolved.
title: SEO batch: Missing articles from soundLike guides — God Hates Us All + Wages of Sin + Animals as Leaders (~3 articles + 3 LLM files)
